cards.back: A large and complex set of data that is difficult to process and analyze using traditional methods
A centralized repository for storing and managing large amounts of data, supporting business intelligence and analytics
A branch of statistics that deals with summarizing and describing the basic features of a dataset, such as mean, median, and mode
A type of data analysis that focuses on a single variable or feature, examining its distribution, central tendency, and variability
The process of representing data in a graphical format, using plots, charts, and other visualizations to communicate insights and trends
